findings.summary: modal volume ls/get subprocess calls leak ~300MB each — 4 procs hit 29GB, jetsam killed MacBook
findings.proposed_fix: Migrate modal_download_results.py to Modal Python SDK vol.read_file(); pre-commit hook guarding subprocess.run in sync code

findings.summary: Orchestrator sync phase silent for 2h — logger=None meant zero output from sync_entries()
findings.evidence: pipeline_rerun.log stopped at line 37 for 2 hours
findings.proposed_fix: Rule: no if-logger pattern in orchestrator utils; always _log(msg,logger) with stdout fallback

findings.summary: 5 orchestrator restarts each re-synced all 98 stages — no local-exists fast-path
findings.evidence: 3 crash-restart cycles, ~100 modal volume ls calls each
findings.proposed_fix: Track sync state in journal; local-size-first skip (implemented)

findings.summary: 14 @stage decorators in code but not registered in pipeline_stages.py — stages silently absent
findings.evidence: Hook alert: stage registration drift for 14 stages
findings.proposed_fix: Promote stage-registration-drift hook from advisory to blocking

findings.summary: SSD unmounted after MacBook crash — orchestrator ran 100 downloads before discovering broken symlink
